name: Marlon Brando
abstract: Marlon Brando Jr. (April 3, 1924 – July 1, 2004) was an American actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Barefield
about_quotes.evidence: we had a nice, nice two years with this show, Marlon Brando... we started picking tunes and putting the tunes together for this Streetcar Named Desire. Then with, you know, with Marlon Brando and Jessica Tandy and all.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: you ever hear of “One Night Jacks” by Hugo Friedhofer, that’s a Marlon Brando picture?
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Candoli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: You had Marlon Brando who would come over and want to play bongos. He played terrible.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Sheller
about_quotes.evidence: And there were stories about how Marlon Brando used to hang out there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Sheller interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 9, 2022
